'''shazhudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrescope|fibrescope]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrescope|fibrescope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shazhudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shæzhidhith || shæzhidhij || shæzhidhish || shæzhidhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shazhuzhudhuth || shazhuzhudhuj || shazhuzhudhush || shazhuzhudhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shazhudhuth || shazhudhuj || shazhudhush || shazhudhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shazhufdhufth || shazhufdhufj || shazhufdhufsh || shazhufdhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shazhudhuthu || shazhudhuju || shazhudhushu || shazhudhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || shazhudhuth || shazhudhuj || shazhudhush || shazhudhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shazhudhuthul || shazhudhujul || shazhudhushul || shazhudhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shazhudhuuthuthu || shazhudhuujuju || shazhudhuushushu || shazhudhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || shazhudhuthun || shazhudhujun || shazhudhushun || shazhudhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shazhudhuthuoro || shazhudhujuoro || shazhudhushuoro || shazhudhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
